items.title: started reading "suppercommunicators" by charles duhigg
items.body_md: started this book - great so far. like the 3 types of conversation idea; what is this really about? how do we feel? who are we?

items.title: site: last 10 commits
items.body_md:
quick sweep of what landed on main lately:

- **count gifs; copy better; link sections** — GIF page: section counts as a right-side badge, permalink + copy for section URLs (#favs etc.), copy-to-clipboard wired to the real control (and shared nav edit styling with feed).
- **gif order of the moment** — shuffled / curated order for a slice of the library.
- **bobarlan gif** — new entry in the GIF data.
- **update jn title; custom gif feed** — feed title tweak + custom GIF showing up in the feed.
- **update gif edit uo** — GIF editor UI polish.
- **add some more gifs** — batch of new GIFs in data.json.
- **add metric shit tonne dump truck gif** — one more for the pile.
- **fix typo** — small copy fix.
- **almost another PR** — hiking / trail content or prep.
- **tag hiking posts** — hiking tags on relevant feed items.
